title: Candace Owens erupts at Andrew Kolvet’s Erika Kirk defense, calls biblical comparison ‘blasphemous’ and ‘sick’
summary_full: Candace Owens and TPUSA spokesman Andrew Kolvet are once again publicly fighting over Charlie Kirk’s legacy. The latest dispute began after Kolvet used a religious analogy to criticize conspiracy theories, prompting Owens to call the post “blasphemous.” The feud is tied to Owens’ ongoing criticism of the official narrative surrounding Kirk’s 2025 killing and her long-running conflict with Erika Kirk.
